messages.content: Write an SEO title for a new coffee brand called Midnight Brew.
Midnight Brew | The Ultimate Dark Roast for Late Night Focus
Give me a meta description for a luxury travel agency.
Experience the world's most exclusive destinations with bespoke itineraries and 5-star service. Book your dream vacation with Elite Escapes today.
What are the top SEO keywords for a SaaS collaboration tool?

1. Team collaboration software
2. Real-time project management
3. Remote team productivity tools
4. Cloud-based workflow automation
